---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new AWS service script or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A short description of the feature you are proposing.

## AWS Service and Operation

- **Service:** e.g. AWS Kinesis
- **Operations:** e.g. create stream, list streams, delete stream

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve or what workflow does it enable?

## Proposed CLI Interface

```bash
python services/<service>/<script>.py --arg1 value1 --arg2 value2
```

## AWS API Reference

Link to the relevant AWS documentation or boto3 API reference.

## Additional Context

Any other context or examples.
